title: dolichos compressus
intro: Dolichos compressus, also known as the "flat bean" or "Indian flat bean", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion, as well as having antimicrobial and wound-healing properties. Dolichos compressus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat different ailments.
